zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Condé於1262年之後出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德孔代-素-利斯考特時，他的父親Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde8770歲，母親Catherine De Cayeux8755歲。他於1289年與Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年7月12日在比利時維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Condé于1262年之后出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德孔代-素-利斯考特时，他的父亲Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde8770岁，母亲Catherine De Cayeux8755岁。他于1289年与Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年7月12日在比利时維斯吉福拉安德倫可特利可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Condé
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Manuel, Luis, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Jorge, Ruben, Angel, Cesar, Fernando.  Portuguese Goncalo, Manoel.
Spanish and Portuguese: nickname from the title of rank conde ‘count’, a derivative of Latin comes, comitis ‘companion’. See Conte .
English (Shropshire): variant of Cundy , a cognate of 3 below, or Cound, a habitational name from Cound in Shropshire.

variants.name: Conte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Angelo, Salvatore, Antonio, Rocco, Carmine, Pasquale, Luigi, Silvio, Silverio, Giuseppe, Sal, Alfonso, Biagio, Carlo, Emilio, Fernando, Gerardo.

Italian: from the title of rank conte ‘count’, from Latin comes, genitive comitis ‘companion’. Probably in this sense (and in the Late Latin sense of ‘traveling companion’), it was a medieval personal name. As a title it was no doubt applied ironically as a nickname for someone with airs and graces or simply as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a count. Compare Lo Conte .
Spanish: variant of   Conde   ‘count’ (see also 1 above).

variants.name: Candee
meanings: Americanized form of French Condé (see Conde ) or, alternatively, Candé, a habitational name from Candé in Maine-et-Loire, or from Candé-sur-Beauvron in Loire-et-Cher, or southern French Condy .
Alternatively, perhaps an altered form of English Condy , a cognate of the name Candé in 1 above.

History: The Candees trace their origin to Zaccheus Cande(e), who in the middle of the 17th century resided in the New Haven County, CT, and his probable father John Condy alias Conde. The name of the latter is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors as Jean/John Candée/Cande/Condé and in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America as John Conde. See also   Conde  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Condé was born after 1262, in Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde, was 8770 and his mother, Catherine De Cayeux, was 8755. He married Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE in 1289. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 July 1302, in Kortrijk, West Flanders, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Condé est né après 1262, à Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde, avait 8770 ans et sa mère, Catherine De Cayeux, avait 8755 ans. Il a épousé Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE en 1289. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1302, à Kortrijk, Flandre occidentale, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Condé nach 1262 in Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde 8770 und seine Mutter Catherine De Cayeux 8755. Er hat 1289 Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Juli 1302 in Kortrijk, West-Flandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Condé è nato il dopo il 1262 nel Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde, aveva 8770 anni e il suo madre, Catherine De Cayeux, aveva 8755 anni. Lui sposato Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE nel 1289. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 luglio 1302, nel Kortrijk, Fiandra Occidentale, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Condéが1262年以後にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードコンドe-スル-ル'エスカウトで生まれた時，父Nicolas II Bailleul de Condeは8770歳，母Catherine De Cayeuxは8755歳であった。1289年にBéatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年7月12日にベルギーウエスト-vラアンデレンコルトリジクで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Condé(이)가 1262년 이후 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 콘드e-수-'스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde(은)는 8770세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine De Cayeux(은)는 8755세였다. 그는 1289년 Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 7월 12일 벨기에 웨스트-블라아더 코르트리j크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Condé nasceu após 1262, em Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde, tinha 8770 anos e sua mãe, Catherine De Cayeux, tinha 8755 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE em 1289. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1302, em Kortrijk, Flandres Ocidental, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Condé родился после 1262 г. в местности кондe-сур-л'ескаут, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde было 8770 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine De Cayeux, 8755. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE в 1289 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 июля 1302 г. в местности кортриджк, вест-влаандирен, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Condé nació después de 1262, en Condé-sur-l'Escaut, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Nicolas II Bailleul de Conde, tenía 8770 años y su mamá, Catherine De Cayeux, tenía 8755 años. Se casó con Béatrice dit d'Offemont de THOUROTTE en 1289. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de julio de 1302, en Kortrijk, Flandes Occidental, Bélgica.
